input.command: cat /workspace/data/users.json | jq -r '.users[].email' | awk -F'@' '{print $2}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn

tool_attempts.perm_reason: Tool 'Bash' requires user permission (no interactive user in trial)
tool_attempts.result_summary: Permission denied: Tool 'Bash' requires user permission (no interactive user in trial)
